title: 10 health benefits of Achillea ageratum (yarrow)
intro: Achillea ageratum has health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving circulation, thanks to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's ability to combat swelling and promote blood flow can alleviate symptoms of arthritis and improve overall cardiovascular health. By applying yarrow topically or consuming it in tea form, individuals may experience reduced pain and stiffness, allowing them to maintain a more active lifestyle and enjoy improved mobility.
